pages.text:
PeopleFlow HR Systems Ltd.

Quarter Ended: Q1 2025

PeopleFlow provides human capital management tools to professional services firms in the UK and Ireland, spanning core HR,
performance management, and analytics.

Key Metrics – Q1 2025

| Metric | Q1 2025 |
| --- | --- |
| Quarterly Revenue | 4.7M |
| Subscription ARR (end of period) | 19.8M |
| Gross Margin | 74% |
| Net Pound Retention-NPR(LTM) | 117% |
| Annual Logo Churn | 4.3% |
| Active Subscriptions | 395 |
| Avg.Seats per Customer | 144 |
| Total Headcount | 92 |

Commentary

In the quarter ended Q1 2025, PeopleFlow delivered Quarterly Revenue of 4.7M, up from 4.4M in Q4 2024. End-of-period
Subscription ARR reached 19.8M. Gross Margin held at 74% despite the ongoing cloud provider migration, which management
expects to conclude in H1 2025. Active Subscriptions reached 395, with growth concentrated in mid-market professional services
firms.

Non-Core Financial Items

• Share-based compensation expense: 0.36M

• No material FX or restructuring charges in Q1 2025.

(1) All figures are denominated in GBP unless otherwise noted.

(2) Net Pound Retention (NPR) is equivalent to 'Net Dollar Retention' reported in Q4 2024; relabelled to reflect GBP reporting currency.

(3) 'Active Subscriptions' is equivalent to 'Paying Customer Logos' in prior periods; terminology updated in Q1 2025.

(4) Logo Churn is annualised on a last-twelve-months basis.
